heading: Anaplan
subheading: Driving Agile, Connected, and Intelligent Enterprise Planning
content:
iSeyon Analytics Anaplan services drive 303% ROI and $43.08M benefits (Forrester TEI).

#### **Connected Planning Implementation**

iSeyon Analytics designs and implements enterprise-wide planning solutions on Anaplan that connect finance, sales, supply chain, HR, and operations. Our solutions eliminate data silos and provide a single, real-time planning environment across departments.

Anaplan connected planning yields 303% ROI per Forrester TEI study. [View Forrester TEI Study](https://www.anaplan.com/blog/anaplan-delivers-303-percent-roi-forrester-tei-study-reveals)

> "What makes Anaplan unique is our leadership in scenario planning across all major functions of an enterprise," said Shashi Gottdiener, Anaplan CFO. [Anaplan 2025](https://www.anaplan.com/news/anaplan-achieves-significant-milestones-in-its-multi-year-business-transformation)

#### **Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A)**

iSeyon Analytics builds robust financial planning models for budgeting, forecasting, scenario planning, and long-term strategic planning. Our Anaplan implementations enhance visibility into financial performance and enable dynamic, driver-based forecasting. 50% FP&A efficiency gains achieved.

Anaplan positioned as 9x Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Planning. [Gartner 2025](https://www.anaplan.com/news/gartner-mq-financial-planning-software-2025)

> The planning systems manager noted: "Anaplan bridges data gaps in automotive FP&A." [Forrester](https://www.anaplan.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/The-Total-Economic-Impact-Of-Anaplan-2022-Forrester-FINAL.pdf)

#### **Sales & Revenue Planning**

iSeyon Analytics develops sales performance management solutions including territory planning, quota setting, incentive compensation management, and revenue forecasting. These solutions improve sales alignment, accuracy, and transparency.

> The planning systems manager noted: "Anaplan bridges data gaps in automotive FP&A." [Forrester](https://www.anaplan.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/The-Total-Economic-Impact-Of-Anaplan-2022-Forrester-FINAL.pdf)

#### **Supply Chain & Operations Planning**

iSeyon Analytics implements supply chain planning models that support demand forecasting, inventory optimization, production planning, and capacity management—helping organizations improve efficiency and reduce operational risk. 10-20% inventory reduction achieved.

#### **Workforce Planning**

Our workforce planning solutions align headcount planning, compensation forecasting, and talent strategies with financial objectives. iSeyon Analytics enables HR and finance teams to collaborate effectively within a unified planning framework. 40% improvement in workforce planning efficiency.

#### **Data Integration & Automation**

iSeyon Analytics integrates Anaplan with ERP, CRM, and data warehouse systems to ensure seamless data flow and real-time updates. Our automated workflows reduce manual effort and improve planning accuracy.

#### **Model Optimization & Governance**

iSeyon Analytics ensures scalable model architecture, access control management, performance optimization, and governance best practices within Anaplan environments to maintain reliability and compliance.

### **iSeyon Anaplan Performance Benchmarks**

| iSeyon Anaplan Metric | Avg. Client Gain |
|---|---|
| Planning Cycle Time Reduction | 45% |
| Forecast Accuracy | +32% |
| Data Silo Elimination | 100% |

**Methodology:** Aggregated from 15+ iSeyon Anaplan implementations 2023-2025.

#### **Training & Ongoing Support**

iSeyon Analytics provides end-user training, administrator enablement, and continuous support to ensure successful adoption and long-term value realization from Anaplan implementations.

Our Anaplan services empower organizations to move from disconnected spreadsheets to intelligent, connected enterprise planning—enabling faster, more confident decision-making across the business. iSeyon Analytics Anaplan Services drive agile planning.

---
